Just now

Everyone Is Looking for the Next AI Tool That Prints Money. I Think They’re Asking the Wrong Question.
Press enter or click to view image in full size

Photo by Growtika on UnsplashEvery week, I see the same headlines.
“10 AI Side Hustles That Will Make You Rich.”
“This AI Tool Made Me $20,000 in a Month.”
“You’re One Prompt Away From Financial Freedom.”
I’ll admit it…
I clicked those articles too.
Who wouldn’t?
The idea that one AI tool could completely change your life is exciting.
But after spending hundreds of hours experimenting with AI, building projects, writing code, and talking to freelancers, I realized something that almost nobody mentions.
AI isn’t making people rich.
People are using AI to become more valuable.
And those are two very different things.
“Money follows value. AI simply helps you create value faster.”
The Biggest Lie About AI
